build_control: baseline and candidate wheels built from the same worktree with identical flags; only the patch differs
scope_correction: The page-scoped verdict below was measured on page 28 only (11 rows). A classifier change has a document-wide blast radius, so it was NOT sufficient evidence on its own.

document_wide.interpretation: All 375 changes are bottom-of-page footers carrying a page marker; 0 blocks added or removed; 0 changes fall outside the expected pattern. The same defect class was corrected on 375 pages, which is the anti-overfit signal: a memorized fix would have moved exactly one block.
